title: Surgeon Vacancy at PGIMER Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at PGIMER Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? PGIMER Advisory Limited in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PGIMER Advisory Limited:
PGIMER Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PGIMER Advisory Limited!
